flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Blinn College District fell 32% between 2006 and 2009 (10.4% → 7.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Blinn College District rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $4.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Blinn College District fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (53.9% → 45.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Blinn College District are 18% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($46.3k vs $39.2k).
